description: Use this API to change the value of a VAR of the VSC dc line model of a specified VSC dc line. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = change_vsdclmod_var(dcname, model, j, rdata)

parameters.name: dcname
parameters.description: Vsc dc line name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Var number to change relative to the start of the block of vars assigned to this model (1 for var(j), 2 for var(j+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New var value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: no model at this dc line.
model at this dc line is aaa not xxx.
VAR number outside of the VAR range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
